intro: Angelica sinensis oil, also known as Dong Quai oil, is an extract derived from the root of the Angelica sinensis plant, a traditional Chinese medicinal herb. Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, this oil is often used in skincare and cosmetic products to promote skin health and reduce inflammation. Its potential anti-aging properties and soothing effects on the skin have made it a popular ingredient in natural and organic skincare formulations.
